text: I feel a quiet curiosity awakening in me here. The space is modern, clean, almost clinical—a site for inquiry and reflection. As I approach the vivid 'R+D' wall, the promise of research and development hangs in the air. I sense both anticipation and mild disorientation; everything seems designed to provoke questions. I feel like both subject and observer, balanced between what is on display and what is left unspoken, my own thoughts swirling with the creative energy of the environment.
